title: eryngium bourgatii var. atlanticum
intro: Eryngium bourgatii var. atlanticum, also known as Atlantic Sea Holly, is a variety of the Eryngium bourgatii plant, a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Atlantic Sea Holly include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
